releaseNotes:
• 📄 PDF Support: Upload PDFs directly in AI chat — extracted and analyzed instantly.
• 🖼️ Multi-Image Chat: Send up to 3 images at once for visual AI assistance.
• 💬 Smarter AI Context: PDF and image context handled seamlessly in background for cleaner conversations.
• 🗂️ Chat History Improved: Images and PDFs now persist correctly across sessions.
• ⚡ Stability Fixes: Faster uploads, better error handling, and timeout improvements.
